steps.title: Attach the opening modifier
steps.content: The opening phrase since uncovering fragments must attach to the noun that immediately follows it. That noun must be the person who uncovered the harness fragments, not an abstract idea.

steps.title: Reject dangling subjects
steps.content: Choice B and Choice D place an argument after the modifier, and Choice C places domestication there. Arguments and domestication cannot uncover artifacts. Placing researcher Robert Losey immediately after the modifier removes the dangling modifier. The answer is A.
